Defendant contests the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AHE AHN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that there was not transfer of asset as a matter of law. Schoenfeld v. Norberg (1970) 11 Cal.App.3d 755 is not on point as expressly stated in this action by judge Spero in October 15, 2029 Order. The Court notes that this order was not discussed and was not provided by the moving party. Moving party is further order to file no later than 9:00 a.m. on July 26, 2021 its reply, which appears to have been served on Plaintiffs (with courtesy copy provided to the court), but not submitted for filing.
